message:
feat: Memoize GetActionableIssues via TriageContext (bv-oko3)

Integrates TriageContext into triage computation for cached lookups:

- ComputeTriageFromAnalyzer now creates TriageContext
- Added computeCountsWithContext using cached IsActionable() - O(1)
- Added buildBlockersToClearWithContext using cached lookups
- Deprecated old functions that recompute actionable issues

This eliminates redundant GetActionableIssues() calls within a single
triage pass. Previously computed 3x, now computed once and cached.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
